Ralph Lauren RL embroidered drawstring loose fit sun protection swim trunks, made of % polyester fiber, with a wow-worthy texture! This fabric is not only lightweight, but also offers excellent sun protection, effectively blocking UV rays! The embroidery is not only secure and not easy to fall off, but also adds a touch of delicacy to the whole piece! The drawstring design is convenient and practical, allowing you to adjust the tightness according to your waist size for comfort. The loose leg design ensures freedom of movement. Sizes available: S-XL.
